package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "net/http"
    "os/exec"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for context_key_uses_exported_or_builtin_type: shows the risky shape for this rule.
// Rule intent: context.WithValue keys or exported key declarations that use built-in scalar types instead of unexported key types.
type Worker struct { ctx context.Context }

func PositiveContextKeyUsesExportedOrBuiltinType(ctx context.Context, url string) {
    child, _ := context.WithTimeout(ctx, time.Second)
    _ = child
    http.Get(url)
    exec.Command("curl", url).Run()
    go func() { http.Get(url) }()
    for {
        select { default: time.Sleep(time.Millisecond) }
    }
}
